.global _start
    _start:
    li t0, 0x0

    li a1, 0xF0F0F0F0
    li a2, -1
    li a3, 0x0123456789ABCDEF
    sd a3, 0(t1)
    sw a0, 0(t2)
    sh a1, 4(t2)
    sb a3, 6(t2)
    ld s0, 0(t1)
    lw s1, 0(t2)
    lh s2, 4(t2)
    lb s3, 6(t2)
    sd s0, 1(t1)

    beqz a4, skip1
    addi a0, a0, 1

    skip1:
    xori a0, a0, 0xAA
    continue:
    lui s6, 0xFFFF0
    add s6, s6, t3
    sd a1, 0(s6)
    addi t3, t3, -8

    li t5, 32

    in_range:

    li      gp, 1

    unimp
